methods.description: The method involves identifying the first and last occurrence of a species in palaeomagnetically dated cores to test the stratigraphic range and determine diachronism across a wide geographic spread.

steps.description: Identify the first and last occurrence of the species in palaeomagnetically dated cores.
steps.searchable_summary: identify species occurrence in dated cores

steps.description: Examine the stratigraphic range of G. margaritae in all identified cores with good palaeomagnetic control.
steps.searchable_summary: examine stratigraphic range in controlled cores

steps.description: Standardize the data by calculating or recalculating all ages in accordance with the Berggren et al timescale.
Determine the distribution of G. margaritae from relevant DSDP or ODP volumes or references.
steps.searchable_summary: determine species distribution from DSDP/ODP volumes

steps.description: Calculate the length of error bars as a function of sample spacing and accumulation rate.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate error bars from sample spacing and accumulation rate
